overview: A narrative-driven, lore-immersive White Paper landing app for Gulag DAO — a decentralized autonomous organization built on the Internet Computer. Tells the story of operative Steven G. Jacobson, the billion-dollar Klondike Gold mission, and the DAO's founding as a digital liberation front. Features seven full-page portals with a dark metallic design, cyan and gold accents, and a classified operational aesthetic.
features: Seven full-page portals (Hero, What is a DAO, Mission, Ecosystem, Governance, Lore, Participation)
Dark metallic design with cyan (#00FFFF) and gold (#FFD700) accents
Classified/operational typography and portal transition philosophy
Geometric reinvented Hammer & Sickle motif as DAO emblem
Circuit-board texture overlays and glowing CTA hover effects
Dual CTAs: Launch The Gate (primary) and Exit
Embedded lore content — Jacobson narrative, Klondike Gold, 2009 rescue
ICP treasury, Payok Coin, governance, and participation explained
